_meta.experiment: sasori.distill — K1 vs K2-replication vs rank ablation (GSM8K recovery)
_meta.teacher: same-size FP, logit-KD + ApiQ error-SVD LoRA init (fixed)
verdict: K1+distill does NOT recover (0.0): the single ternary plane is too damaged for LoRA-KD to rescue.
K2+distill REPLICATES across families: Qwen3-1.7B 0->0.447 flex (even stronger than Qwen2.5-1.5B 0->0.32) -> effect is real, not model-specific.
rank-16 FAILS (0.013): the LoRA needs full rank-64; the ~+20% bit cost is necessary, not optional.
Frontier (open): K2+rank64-LoRA ~4.1 bpw < K3 4.9 bpw, recovering 0.32-0.45 flex -> promising, but needs K3-GSM8K on these models to claim it beats K3 on quality/bit.
